Taking advantage of the religious edict sanctity of Temple Mount was destroyed by Palestinians who started throwing stones at the Jews praying at the Western Wall below. The Edict was modified permitting security forces to enter Temple Mount & it led to Intifada (violent uprising).

Israel than bunked Oslo Accords & progressively enlarged its territorial control over West Bank & separated E. Jerusalem from Bethlehem by huge concrete wall & rehabilitated Jews in E.
